title: Bitter Chewy Moroccan Tahini Flatbread
description: A quick-fix Moroccan dish featuring tahini, perfect for a dairy-free friendly snack or light meal. The bitter and chewy texture comes from the combination of tahini, olive oil, and dark molasses.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, salt, and baking powder.
In a separate bowl, mix the tahini, olive oil, and dark molasses until smooth.
Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients, stirring with a fork until a dough forms.
Add the water and continue stirring until the dough comes together in a ball.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into 4 equal pieces and roll each into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a disk shape, about 1/4 inch thick.
Place the disks on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the edges are lightly golden.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
